name: padosoft/php-oara
description: The goal of the Open Affiliate Report Aggregator (OARA) is to develop a set of PHP classes that can download affiliate reports from a number of affiliate networks, and store the data in a common format.

suggest.phpoffice/phpspreadsheet: Required for spreadsheet-based providers such as AvantLink and Bol. Install ^1.30.5 on PHP 7.4+.
